name: Queso Blanco Fresco and Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique Brand Queso Blanco Fresco
recipeInstructions:
Slice the cheese into 1/4-inch slices. In a serving platter, alternate layers of sliced tomatoes, onions, and cucumber. Drizzle with the Cilantro vinaigrette.
Cilantro Vinaigrette:
Combine lime juice, lime zest, cilantro, garlic, and white wine vinegar in a blender. When the cilantro has broken down into a fine purée, start adding the oil gradually. Taste for tartness and add salt and pepper to taste.
